from source import powerset

def test_powerset_contains_all_subsets_for_two_elements():
    result = powerset([1, 2])
    expected = [[], [1], [2], [1, 2]]
    assert len(result) == len(expected), f"Expected {len(expected)} subsets for [1, 2], got {len(result)}"
    assert set(map(tuple, result)) == set(map(tuple, expected)), "Resulting power set is missing expected subsets or has incorrect ones"
